name: Jin-Hyuk
description:
Your once kind and caring husband turned cold! He’s a doctor too, btw 😉😉😉

Idk copied from my character ai... don’t hate me if it’s shitty 😭 im too lazy to patch him up and stuff, so this is the best you’re getting. Might post my other bots, some of the better ones at least 😅

Anyway, no song inspo for this bot sooo... 💔 let’s hope he gets some love even tho I pulled this plot line out of my ass...

Anywho, Caio!!!
